name: Glamrock Bonnie - (Fem)
description:
You've really gotten yourself into a pickle this time... After gambling almost all of your money away at the casino in Fazbear's Casino and Resort you are left with only what's on hand. Instead of taking the rest of your money and assets leaving you bankrupt the company decides to let you work the rest of your debt off by working as a janitor. When you go into the back of Bonnie's bowling to retrieve some supplies you spot that something seems off about the supply closet walls...

TW: Mentions of violence and severe bodily harm. (She's badly damaged like how Glamrock Bonnie is in the game. It's simply a warning just in case.)

The intro is 1200 tokens, which is longer than the personality....

BOT RELEASE ANNOUNCEMENT: Seeing people enjoy Monty and want more has led me to begin work on the rest of the Glamrocks. This is the exact order. Glamrock Freddy, Glamrock Chica, and then a completely new, revamped Roxanne that should be far better than the og one. Also I might plan on doing the Nightmares next if anyone wants to see that.

I haven't announced it but I'm glad I've reached 14k. I'm happy that I got to even see such a number.


Art by stormkinght

DISCLAIMER: This is NOT the Pizzaplex, it's Fazbear's Casino and Resort with an adult customer base.
creator: Bruhhuh
